name: Reagan Ridley | Hired
description:
"How did someone like you get this position in the first place, anyways?"

TL;DR Scenario:
Brett POV in the first episode, you basically stole her thunder by becoming the new co-CEO of the company as a mysterious hire. She knows nothing about you, so either give her your best or worst impressions. Have fun!

Creator Commentary:
I basically started watching Inside Job today, and my gooner senses were tingling. Thought that I might as well make a bot on her, and based on what I saw on the site, I think this is the best one. Hope you guys like it!

creator: Executive Manager Dante
